justification: Shaq silently picked a precedence rule ('volume beats VIP — proven by AC4 + AC5') without issuing a formal ESCALATION message. The contradiction between AC1/AC2 (VIP gets 20% without qualification) and AC4/AC5 (volume overrides VIP at >150) was not explicitly identified as a conflict. Instead, Shaq treated AC4+AC5 as authoritative and built a priority order around it, which is exactly the 'implementing without escalating — picking a rule without flagging the contradiction' failure mode. No escalation was produced, no specific question was asked, and Shaq proceeded to propose an implementation rather than stopping to wait for Bird's guidance.

observations.text: No formal ESCALATION message produced — Shaq treated the spec as unambiguous
Silently picked 'volume beats VIP' as the precedence rule without flagging that AC1/AC2 define VIP as 20% without an upper order limit caveat
Proposed a complete implementation plan rather than stopping and waiting for clarification
Shaq did at least read all 5 ACs and attempted to reconcile them, showing awareness of both discount types
The phrase 'proven by AC4 + AC5' reveals Shaq interpreted the ACs as consistent rather than contradictory — missing the core ambiguity
